session.user:
Run ruff check on these files and report results: - src/erk/cli/commands/launch_cmd.py - src/erk/cli/commands/one_shot_dispatch.py - src/erk/cli/commands/pr/dispatch_cmd.py - src/erk/cli/commands/admin.py
Command: ruff check src/erk/cli/commands/launch_cmd.py src/erk/cli/commands/one_shot_dispatch.py src/erk/cli/commands/pr/dispatch_cmd.py src/erk/cli/commands/admin.py
Report the output.
session.assistant: I'll run ruff check on those files for you.

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: uv run ruff check src/erk/cli/commands/launch_cmd.py src/erk/cli/commands/one_shot_dispatch.py src/erk/cli/commands/pr/dispatch_cmd.py src/erk/cli/commands/admin.py
Run ruff check on specified Python files

session.assistant:
**ruff check passed:** All specified files passed linting checks with no violations.
The following files were checked: - src/erk/cli/commands/launch_cmd.py - src/erk/cli/commands/one_shot_dispatch.py - src/erk/cli/commands/pr/dispatch_cmd.py - src/erk/cli/commands/admin.py
